# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** 202-225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives
  - **State:** CA  **District:** 17
  - File an original and 2 copies
- [ ] Officer or Employee
  - Employing Office: _____
  - File an original and 1 copy

**Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** [ ] Yes  [X] No

_If you answered "yes" to this question, please contact the Committee on Ethics for further guidance._

**Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report.** For amendments, please provide the date of the report you are amending.
- [X] Initial Report
- [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: _____

**(For Official Use Only)** — Stamp: LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER, 2019 AUG 6 PM 1:02, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES. Marked HAND DELIVERED. Initials "MC".

_A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late._

Transaction grid on this page contains only the printed **Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock** row (Sale, 02/05/2015, notified 03/07/15, amount B) and the notation **"Please see the attached"** with blank checkbox rows. No actual transaction data on this page.
